public_business_info.name: Southpaw Training Center
public_business_info.location: 13501 Dorman Road, Pineville, North Carolina 28134, United States

evidence: Public first-class/signup links point to WellnessLiving.
Gmail operational messages come from no-reply@wellnessliving.com.
App store listings describe class signup, membership management, and event updates.
operational_backend.decision: Keep WellnessLiving as scheduling, membership, payment, app, reminder, and cancellation backend for v1.

ux_strengths: Coach Jamie's credentials create unusual trust for a local gym.
Small-group coaching is a strong differentiator.
Community and family tone can reduce first-timer intimidation.
Programs have breadth: boxing, strength, agility, wellness, parties, special programs.
ux_friction: Navigation is too broad for first-timers.
Booking handoff needs more context before sending users to WellnessLiving.
Schedule and shop pages appear thin from public text snapshot.
Program hierarchy needs a clearer primary conversion path.
Coach/media proof should be surfaced earlier and made easier to scan.
First-class anxiety questions should be answered before CTA.

v1_pages.goal: Convert first-time visitors to first-class signup.
Explain what to expect and reduce intimidation.
Help users self-select by goal, intensity, and experience level.
Turn credentials, story, and media into trust.
Send users to WellnessLiving with enough context.

notes.role: Founder / UX / Architecture / Data / SEO / Safety

ux: Test CTA clarity and thumb reach.
architecture: Connect Cloudflare Worker review endpoint only after selecting repo/issue target.
data: Create dashboard plan for program interest and review-note themes.
seo: Add schema.org LocalBusiness and SportsActivityLocation markup later.
Build title/meta map for Pineville and Charlotte search intent.
content: Rewrite Coach Jamie page into scannable proof blocks.
safety_legal: Link approved privacy, terms, and cancellation policies.
